subject: Interview with Data Platform team
snippet: Your interview is scheduled for 2026-04-28 at 14:30. Google Meet: https://meet.google.com/demo-call
body: Hi! Your interview with the Data Platform team is scheduled for 2026-04-28 at 14:30 Europe/Amsterdam. Please join using https://meet.google.com/demo-call. We expect the call to take about one hour.

subject: Project deadline reminder
snippet: Deadline for the hackathon MVP is 2026-04-30.
body: Reminder: the final deadline for the hackathon MVP is 2026-04-30. Please submit before the end of the day.

subject: Weekly newsletter
snippet: A regular product newsletter with product updates.
body: This email contains product updates and links to blog posts.

subject: Созвон по запуску проекта
body: Привет! Созвон по запуску проекта пройдет 29.04.2026 в 10:00. Ссылка: https://meet.google.com/rus-demo
